name: HRT_RATING_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT RC.CATEGORY_ID, RC.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RC.RATING_MODEL_ID, RC.LOWER_BOUNDARY, RC.UPPER_BOUNDARY, RCTL.CATEGORY_NAME, RCTL.CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION, RC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RC.MODULE_ID, RC.CREATED_BY, RC.CREATION_DATE, RC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_RATING_CATEGORIES_B RC, HRT_RATING_CATEGORIES_TL RCTL WHERE RC.CATEGORY_ID = RCTL.CATEGORY_ID AND RC.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = RCTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND RCTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
